summary: Verified self-service password change feature in Employee Dashboard. All 20 backend tests and 22 frontend tests passed. New features tested: Security button in header, Security Settings modal with password status, change password flow requiring current password/new password/confirm password.
seed_data_creation: Used existing test employee (testemployee@thriftycurator.com with password test1234)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Self-service password change feature fully tested. Employee Dashboard now has Security button that opens Security Settings modal. Modal shows password status (Password Protected for employees with password set) and allows changing password with current/new/confirm fields. Backend endpoint /api/auth/employee/change-password verified working with proper validation.

tests: Shows 'Password Protected' for employee with password
